slug.fullDescription:
Solara is a free external Windows script executor, featuring: 

* No key system, only advertisements to download the bootstrapper/portable download
* 39% sUNC 
* Often, one of the first exploits to update under normal Roblox update conditions
* Comes with [Konstant Decompiler](https://discord.com/invite/konstant-tm-tm-lykooking-tm-krack-tm-tm-tm-tm-1277806964356939837) and supports Multi-Instance
* Easy-to-use interface for new exploiters

Solara has built a great reputation since its release as one of the first external Roblox executors to hit the market, and has been steadily receiving updates for over a year!

! Things to keep in mind: 

! Due to the nature of being an **external executor** (Doesn’t inject internally), Solara lacks exploit functions that many scripts use. If you are looking to develop scripts or use scripts with more advanced features, you’ll need to use another executor. But overall, for basic use, Solara serves its purpose very well.

slug.fullDescription:
Potassium is a lifetime premium Windows script executor costing $22.99, featuring: 

* Simple, clean executor interface/internal executor
* 100% sUNC
* Fast updates under normal Roblox update conditions
* Comes with a decompiler built in and supports Multi-Instance

! Things to keep in mind: 

! This exploit uses **kernel-level injection**, meaning that after using it, you will need to restart your PC to play games with kernel-level anticheats. This could also cause rare issues you wouldn’t normally see on a user-mode executor (BSODs, weird memory errors, etc.).

! This exploit has been **detected** in the past due to certain exploit functions, but those functions have been fixed. You should still keep this in mind when testing sUNC scores.

Otherwise, this exploit is a very good deal compared to other subscription-based exploits. A good exploit environment for developers on a budget. Offers decent stability for most users, but for the best experience, we recommend using [Windows 11](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/software-download/windows11).
No description currently available. Check back soon!
